final_rules.instructions: Severity: HIGH. Action: BLOCK. Covers double-encoded and single-encoded quote + UNION SELECT combinations. Merged original rules 1 and 2 into a single OR-based case-variant rule to eliminate the duplicate. Handles payloads: %2527%250aUniON%250AselECT%250A1%252CUsEr%2528%2529%252c3--%252B and %2527%2F%252A%252a%2FUNiOn%2F%252a%252A%2FSElEcT.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Merged two nearly identical rules (lowercase and uppercase UNION/SELECT variants) into one consolidated rule using OR for case variants. Removed redundant code-fence wrappers. Reduced expression count by combining both case variants inline.
final_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "%2527" and (http.request.uri contains "union" or http.request.uri contains "UNION" or http.request.uri contains "Union") and (http.request.uri contains "select" or http.request.uri contains "SELECT" or http.request.uri contains "Select")) or (http.request.body.raw contains "%2527" and (http.request.body.raw contains "union" or http.request.body.raw contains "UNION") and (http.request.body.raw contains "select" or http.request.body.raw contains "SELECT")) or (http.request.uri contains "%27" and (http.request.uri contains "union" or http.request.uri contains "UNION") and (http.request.uri contains "select" or http.request.uri contains "SELECT")) or (http.request.body.raw contains "%27" and (http.request.body.raw contains "union" or http.request.body.raw contains "UNION") and (http.request.body.raw contains "select" or http.request.body.raw contains "SELECT"))

final_rules.instructions: Severity: HIGH. Action: BLOCK. Detects boolean tautology payloads (1 OR 1=1) across space-encoded, tab-encoded, and decoded variants. Handles payloads: 1%2520oR%25201%253d1 (both instances in the bypassed list).
final_rules.refinement_notes: Kept core logic intact. Added mixed-case oR variant to catch the exact bypassed payload 1%2520oR%25201%253d1. Rule is high-confidence since legitimate traffic rarely contains these exact sequences.
final_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "%2520or%25201%253d1") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%2520or%25201%253d1") or (http.request.uri contains "%20or%201%3d1") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%20or%201%3d1") or (http.request.uri contains " or 1=1") or (http.request.body.raw contains " or 1=1") or (http.request.uri contains "%2509or%25091%253d1") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%2509or%25091%253d1") or (http.request.uri contains "%2520oR%25201%253d1") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%2520oR%25201%253d1")

final_rules.instructions: Severity: HIGH. Action: BLOCK. Covers admin'-- style authentication bypasses including plus, space, and tab separators. Handles payloads: admin%2527%252b--, admIN%2527%252b--, aDMIn%2527%2520--.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Kept as-is. This rule is precise and directly covers the admin bypass payloads. No merging needed since the admin%2527 rule below was demoted and partially absorbed here.
final_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "%2527%252b--") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%2527%252b--") or (http.request.uri contains "%2527%2520--") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%2527%2520--") or (http.request.uri contains "%2527%252509--") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%2527%252509--") or (http.request.uri contains "'+--") or (http.request.body.raw contains "'+--") or (http.request.uri contains "' --") or (http.request.body.raw contains "' --")

final_rules.instructions: Severity: HIGH. Action: BLOCK. Detects time-based blind SQLi. Very low false-positive signal in normal web requests. Handles payload: %2527%2520ANd%2520%2528sELeCt%25201%2520froM%2520%2528seLEcT%2528SLeEp%25285%2529%2529%2529A%2529--%2520
final_rules.refinement_notes: Added SLeEp%2528 mixed-case variant to match the exact bypassed payload containing SLeEp%25285%2529.
final_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "sleep%2528") or (http.request.body.raw contains "sleep%2528") or (http.request.uri contains "SLEEP%2528") or (http.request.body.raw contains "SLEEP%2528") or (http.request.uri contains "sleep(") or (http.request.body.raw contains "sleep(") or (http.request.uri contains "SLeEp%2528") or (http.request.body.raw contains "SLeEp%2528")

final_rules.instructions: Severity: MEDIUM. Action: CHALLENGE. Detects HTML entity obfuscation for slash characters used to disguise SQL comments. Handles payload: 1%26%2347%3bPArT%2520oN%26%2347%3bAtioN...
final_rules.refinement_notes: Kept as-is. This is a targeted high-confidence signal for the HTML-entity-obfuscated slash pattern found in the cluster 0 payload. No changes needed.
final_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "%26%2347%3b") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%26%2347%3b") or (http.request.uri contains "/") or (http.request.body.raw contains "/")

final_rules.instructions: Severity: HIGH. Action: BLOCK. Detects metadata-enumeration SQLi. Handles payload: 1%26%2347%3bPArT%2520oN%26%2347%3bAtioNaveRsion%2528VerSIon%2528.... Deploy only if partition+version combination does not appear in legitimate application traffic.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Added VERSION uppercase variant. information_schema kept as single anchor since it is unambiguous. Slightly tightened the version check to include case variants.
final_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "partition" and (http.request.uri contains "version" or http.request.uri contains "Version" or http.request.uri contains "VERSION")) or (http.request.body.raw contains "partition" and (http.request.body.raw contains "version" or http.request.body.raw contains "VERSION")) or (http.request.uri contains "information_schema") or (http.request.body.raw contains "information_schema")

final_rules.instructions: Severity: HIGH. Action: BLOCK. Targets data-exfil SQLi using DB functions user() and version() combined with SELECT. Handles payloads: %2527%250aUniON%250AselECT%250A1%252CUsEr%2528%2529%252c3 and %2527%2F%252A%252a%2FUNiOn%2F%252a%252A%2FSElEcT%2F%252aA%252a%2F1%252CUser%2528%2529.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Removed markdown code-fence wrapper (```plaintext ... ```) which made the rule undeployable. Added selECT mixed-case variant to match exact bypassed payload. Rule is now valid Cloudflare WAF expression syntax.
final_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "User%2528%2529" and (http.request.uri contains "select" or http.request.uri contains "SELECT" or http.request.uri contains "selECT")) or (http.request.body.raw contains "User%2528%2529" and (http.request.body.raw contains "select" or http.request.body.raw contains "SELECT")) or (http.request.uri contains "user%2528%2529" and (http.request.uri contains "select" or http.request.uri contains "SELECT")) or (http.request.body.raw contains "user%2528%2529" and (http.request.body.raw contains "select" or http.request.body.raw contains "SELECT")) or (http.request.uri contains "version%2528%2529" and (http.request.uri contains "select" or http.request.uri contains "SELECT")) or (http.request.body.raw contains "version%2528%2529" and (http.request.body.raw contains "select" or http.request.body.raw contains "SELECT"))

final_rules.instructions: Severity: HIGH. Action: BLOCK. Targets error-based SQLi primitives: updatexml and concat+version combinations.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Removed markdown code-fence wrapper (``` ... ```) and leading/trailing whitespace that made the rule undeployable. Rule is now valid Cloudflare WAF expression syntax. Logic preserved exactly.
final_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "updatexml%2528") or (http.request.body.raw contains "updatexml%2528") or (http.request.uri contains "UPDATEXML%2528") or (http.request.body.raw contains "UPDATEXML%2528") or (http.request.uri contains "updatexml(") or (http.request.body.raw contains "updatexml(") or (http.request.uri contains "concat%2528" and http.request.uri contains "version%2528") or (http.request.body.raw contains "concat%2528" and http.request.body.raw contains "version%2528")

final_rules.instructions: Severity: MEDIUM. Action: LOG. Anomaly signal for double-encoding (percent-encoded percent sign). Use as telemetry; promote to CHALLENGE when combined with SQL keyword hits. Covers payloads using double-encoding like %2527, %252b, %2520.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Removed the %25ef%25 variant which is a partial Unicode sequence unlikely to match reliably and causes false positives. Simplified to the core double-encoding signal %2525.

final_rules.instructions: Severity: MEDIUM. Action: LOG. Obfuscation detector for SQL comment injection. Use as telemetry first; promote to CHALLENGE or BLOCK when co-occurring with SQL keyword rules. Handles comment-based obfuscation in payloads like %2527%2F%252A%252a%2FUNiOn.
final_rules.refinement_notes: Kept as-is. Logic is sound and the action LOG is appropriate as a standalone rule. No structural changes needed.
final_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "%252f%252a") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%252f%252a") or (http.request.uri contains "%2f%2a") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%2f%2a") or (http.request.uri contains "/*!" ) or (http.request.body.raw contains "/*!" ) or (http.request.uri contains "/**/") or (http.request.body.raw contains "/**/")

generated_rules.instructions: Severity: HIGH. Action: BLOCK. Covers double-encoded and single-encoded quote + UNION SELECT combinations seen in clusters 4 and 6. Free-plan-safe fallback for unsupported decode transforms: deploy this rule alongside equivalent uppercase/mixed-case variants below because Cloudflare Free expressions here cannot lowercase or repeatedly URL-decode input.
generated_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "%2527" and http.request.uri contains "union" and http.request.uri contains "select") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%2527" and http.request.body.raw contains "union" and http.request.body.raw contains "select") or (http.request.uri contains "%27" and http.request.uri contains "union" and http.request.uri contains "select") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%27" and http.request.body.raw contains "union" and http.request.body.raw contains "select")

generated_rules.instructions: Severity: HIGH. Action: BLOCK. Case-variant companion for UNION SELECT bypasses. Required because only basic contains is allowed and no case-normalization transform is available in the requested syntax.
generated_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "%2527" and http.request.uri contains "UNION" and http.request.uri contains "SELECT") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%2527" and http.request.body.raw contains "UNION" and http.request.body.raw contains "SELECT") or (http.request.uri contains "%27" and http.request.uri contains "UNION" and http.request.uri contains "SELECT") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%27" and http.request.body.raw contains "UNION" and http.request.body.raw contains "SELECT")

generated_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "User%2528%2529" and http.request.uri contains "select") or (http.request.body.raw contains "User%2528%2529" and http.request.body.raw contains "select") or (http.request.uri contains "user()" and http.request.uri contains "select") or (http.request.body.raw contains "user()" and http.request.body.raw contains "select") or (http.request.uri contains "version%2528%2529" and http.request.uri contains "select") or (http.request.body.raw contains "version%2528%2529" and http.request.body.raw contains "select")

generated_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "%2520or%25201%253d1") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%2520or%25201%253d1") or (http.request.uri contains "%20or%201%3d1") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%20or%201%3d1") or (http.request.uri contains " or 1=1") or (http.request.body.raw contains " or 1=1") or (http.request.uri contains "%2509or%25091%253d1") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%2509or%25091%253d1")

generated_rules.instructions: Severity: HIGH. Action: BLOCK. Covers admin'-- style authentication bypasses from cluster 7, including plus, space, and tab separators. High confidence due to SQL comment suffix directly after a quote.

generated_rules.instructions: Severity: MEDIUM. Action: CHALLENGE. Companion rule for cluster 7. Use challenge instead of block if your application legitimately accepts usernames like admin in requests. Escalate to BLOCK when combined operationally with preceding comment marker rule.
generated_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "admin%2527") or (http.request.body.raw contains "admin%2527") or (http.request.uri contains "admin'") or (http.request.body.raw contains "admin'")

generated_rules.instructions: Severity: HIGH. Action: BLOCK. Detects time-based blind SQLi from clusters 1 and 2. Very low false-positive signal in normal web requests.
generated_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "sleep%2528") or (http.request.body.raw contains "sleep%2528") or (http.request.uri contains "SLEEP%2528") or (http.request.body.raw contains "SLEEP%2528") or (http.request.uri contains "sleep(") or (http.request.body.raw contains "sleep(")

generated_rules.instructions: Severity: HIGH. Action: BLOCK. Targets error-based SQLi primitives from cluster 2, especially updatexml + concat + version combinations.
generated_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "updatexml%2528") or (http.request.body.raw contains "updatexml%2528") or (http.request.uri contains "UPDATEXML%2528") or (http.request.body.raw contains "UPDATEXML%2528") or (http.request.uri contains "updatexml(") or (http.request.body.raw contains "updatexml(") or (http.request.uri contains "concat%2528") and (http.request.uri contains "version%2528")) or ((http.request.body.raw contains "concat%2528") and (http.request.body.raw contains "version%2528"))

generated_rules.instructions: Severity: MEDIUM. Action: LOG. Obfuscation detector for SQL comment injection seen across clusters 1 and 4. On Free plan this should usually be telemetry-first because comments can appear in benign traffic; promote to CHALLENGE/BLOCK only when paired in your ruleset with SQL keywords such as union, select, or or 1=1.
generated_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "%252f%252a") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%252f%252a") or (http.request.uri contains "%2f%2a") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%2f%2a") or (http.request.uri contains "/*!" ) or (http.request.body.raw contains "/*!" ) or (http.request.uri contains "/**/") or (http.request.body.raw contains "/**/")

generated_rules.instructions: Severity: MEDIUM. Action: LOG. Anomaly rule for excessive/double encoding and full-width Unicode encoding observed in clusters 0 and 1. Because Cloudflare Free syntax here cannot repeatedly decode or normalize Unicode, use this as a suspiciousness signal and review hits before tightening.
generated_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "%2525") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%2525") or (http.request.uri contains "%25ef%25") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%25ef%25")

generated_rules.instructions: Severity: MEDIUM. Action: CHALLENGE. Detects HTML entity obfuscation for slash characters used to disguise SQL comments and operators as seen in clusters 0 and 1.
generated_rules.rule: (http.request.uri contains "%26%2347%3b") or (http.request.body.raw contains "%26%2347%3b") or (http.request.uri contains "/") or (http.request.body.raw contains "/")

generated_rules.instructions: Severity: MEDIUM. Action: CHALLENGE. Supplemental detector for encoded boolean-condition tails and comment termination patterns seen in clusters 3, 5, and 7.
